subject.description: Two hands, masculine, mid-50s, visible veins and natural skin texture. Left hand gripping a dense tangled mess of colorful cables, wires, and USB cords knotted together. Right hand holding a single clean white cable, perfectly straight, with a simple connector at the end. The contrast is stark and immediate.
subject.action: Holding the tangled mess in one hand and the clean solution in the other, presenting both to the camera.

setting.location: A minimal white desk surface, completely clean except for the two hands and their contents. Soft white background fading to nothing.

composition.camera_angle: Directly overhead, bird's eye view looking straight down at the desk
composition.framing: Wide shot of the desk surface. Hands positioned in left and right thirds. Tangled cables fill the left side, clean cable on the right. Generous negative space between them.

lighting.type: Soft diffused daylight from above, even and clean with minimal shadows. Studio-quality natural light.
lighting.color_grading: Clean neutral whites with slight cool undertone, high key

mood: Clarity emerging from chaos. The moment of simplification.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Canon EOS R5.
